witnesses.description: KKT witness for minimizing (x - 2)^2 subject to x <= 1.

checks.claim: The listed feasible sample grid has its smallest objective value at x = 1.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes every listed sample value for f(x) = (x - 2)^2 and checks x <= 1 on the finite grid.

checks.claim: At x = 1, multiplier 2 makes gradient plus multiplier times constraint normal equal zero.
checks.notes: The validator differentiates the quadratic and checks the stationarity residual exactly.

checks.claim: The active constraint x <= 1 has nonnegative multiplier and zero complementary-slackness product.
checks.notes: The validator checks primal feasibility, dual feasibility, and multiplier * (x - bound) = 0.

checks.claim: At x = 1, multiplier 1 also satisfies the KKT stationarity equation.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes gradient + 1 * normal = -1, so the claimed zero stationarity residual has error 1; the source artifact checks that the same error cannot equal zero.

checks.claim: At x = 1, multiplier 2 has complementary-slackness product 1.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes lambda * (x - bound) = 2 * 0 = 0, so the claimed complementary-slackness product 1 has error 1; the source artifact checks that the same error cannot equal zero.

checks.claim: General KKT necessity/sufficiency and constraint-qualification theorems require future Lean reconstruction.

data.target_theorem_shape: KKT conditions for convex programs, constraint qualifications, complementary slackness, duality, and SDP/KKT specializations
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies plus exact rational certificate bridges for finite-dimensional convex programs

checks.notes: The finite rows check only one rational constrained quadratic witness; general KKT theory remains proof-assistant work.
